title: Help with Zapier integration JSON

posts.author: proagenda.com (Jordy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to get some code setup to fill out more details on a pulse from a zapier integration.
I got the basic one working but have problem with the others, for example: to change a status label/

I tried the following:

{“COLUMN ID” : {“label” : “DATA ENTRY”}}

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @proagenda.com! I would recommend reposting this in our developers community here. The community is managed by members of our dev and technical CS team.

In the meantime, I do also have some recommendations for additional resources to help you get started:

  • How to create an integration with Zapier

  • Zapier JSON formatting examples

  • How to create an integration with Integromat
